final:
module top_module(
input in,
input enable,
input clk,
output reg out
    );always@(posedge clk)
begin
if(enable)
    begin
    out=in;
    end
else
    begin
    out=out;
    end
end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (enable) begin
        out = ~in;
      end else begin
        out = ~out;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
